spell.iss_csw.charge_ray_of_frost.guide: fire a ray of frost at the target. The impacted area explodes, dealing secondary damage.
spell.iss_csw.blizzard.guide: Target a single area summon a blizzard from above for the duration of the spell
spell.iss_csw.frostwhirl_slash.guide: Spin unleash a frost-imbued sweeping melee attack. Damage scales with your held weapon's melee damage and enchantments
spell.iss_csw.rime_veil.guide: Conjure a dense mist that grants true invisibility. Your first melee attack after breaking invisibility is a guaranteed critical hit
spell.iss_csw.summon_polar_bear.guide: Cast to summon an ride on a faster polar bear who will follow, protect, and fight for you, as well as providing a mount, even can jump!
spell.iss_csw.pinning_stake.guide: Hurl a stake that ensnares the target with magical roots, preventing all non-magical movement. Damage is doubled against targets that cannot be entangled.
spell.iss_csw.barrage_volley.guide: After a brief charge, continuously and rapidly fires a barrage of magic arrows forward
spell.iss_csw.hemovaporize.guide: Curses the target, causing their blood to magically vaporize, inflicting continuous life loss.
spell.iss_csw.totem_rite.guide: Place a hollow totem at the target location to invoke a ritual circle. Enemies within the area continuously take damage. If it slays a target, an undead totem is successfully created.
spell.iss_csw.spell_empowerment.guide: improve you cast next spell's level
spell.iss_csw.firefly_seeker.guide: Summons a swarm of fireflies that automatically track and attack the targeted enemy, dealing continuous damage.
spell.iss_csw.marked_shot.guide: First cast locks onto an enemy. During the duration, firing arrows will launch additional homing magic arrows at the target.
spell.iss_csw.conjure_refreshment.guide: Creates a magical cookie whose nutritional value scales with your Spell Power!
spell.iss_csw.spellbreak_burst.guide: After a short charge, release a magical shockwave that dispels nearby spells and deals bonus damage , will deals more damage to undead enemies.
spell.iss_csw.gust_pro.guide: Summons a powerful gust of wind that knocks back and damages entities in front of you. Entities that collide with blocks take additional damage.
spell.iss_csw.lob_creeper_chain.guide: Lob the head of a creeper forward that explodes in a medium radius around the impact and will conjure a ring of creeper heads that falls to the ground and explodes. The higher the level, the faster the projectile.
effect.iss_csw.rime_veil.description: Conjure a dense mist that grants true invisibility. Your first melee attack after breaking invisibility is a guaranteed critical hit
effect.iss_csw.spell_improve.description: improve you cast next spell's level
ui.iss_csw.cast_error_totem: No hollow totem available to cast
ui.iss_csw.undead_slayer: Will deals more damage to undead enemies
tooltip.iss_csw.nameless_set.name: Set effect:The Nameless
tooltip.iss_csw.nameless_set.desc: Equip all Nameless gear to activate a Mana Shield
tooltip.iss_csw.nameless_helmet_ability: Armor-piercing damage is still mitigated by Armor.
tooltip.iss_csw.nameless_chestplate_abil: Casting a spell has a chance to not trigger its Cooldown.
tooltip.iss_csw.nameless_boots_ability: : Converts Fall and Impact damage into Mana restoration.
tooltip.iss_csw.magic_cookies.no_magic: yet to be infused with magic...
death.attack.iss_csw.totem_rite: %1$s was made into totem of undying
death.attack.iss_csw.charge_ray_of_frost: %1$s was blasted by %2$s's ray of frost
death.attack.iss_csw.frostwhirl_slash: %1$s was sliced into two halves by frostwhirl slash
death.attack.iss_csw.pinning_stake: %1$s was impaled by a wooden stake.
advancements.iss_csw.root.title: Interlace SpellWeaves
advancements.iss_csw.root.description: Where the threads of magic intertwine
advancements.iss_csw.spell_forge.title: Spell Stitch
advancements.iss_csw.mix_spell.title: Cocktail!
advancements.iss_csw.mana_pearl.title: Enchantment Infused!
advancements.iss_csw.arcane_pearl.title: Breakthrough!
advancements.iss_csw.fire_pearl.title: Burn..
advancements.iss_csw.ice_pearl.title: Freeze!
advancements.iss_csw.nature_pearl.title: Growth and Life and Happiness and Friends
advancements.iss_csw.evoca_pearl.title: ---RAID---
advancements.iss_csw.holy_pearl.title: Put your faith in the Light!
advancements.iss_csw.blood_pearl.title: A Toast!
advancements.iss_csw.thunder_pearl.title: Witness the power of thunder!
advancements.iss_csw.end_pearl.title: End Breath
advancements.iss_csw.abyss_pearl.title: Power comes at a price
tooltip.iss_csw.enhanced_pearl_transfer: Inserted for enchanting, will add extra enchantments from this Crystal Pearl.
tooltip.iss_csw.enhanced_pearl_desc: Provides higher enchantment bonuses in the Enchanting Table
tooltip.iss_csw.shriving_stone: Place this item in the second slot of an anvil to strip the bottom enchantment from the item in the first slot
tooltip.iss_csw.enhanced_pearl_desc3: Applies a random curse to the item.
enchantment.iss_csw.flameburn.desc: Increases Fire Spell Power and Attack Speed by 3% per level (Neutralizes with Frozen Deck)
enchantment.iss_csw.frostdeck.desc: Increases Frost Spell Power by 3% and Armor by 1 per level (Neutralizes with Flameburn)
enchantment.iss_csw.wildgrowth.desc: Increases Nature Spell Power and Max Health by 3% per level (Neutralizes with Evocation Soul)
enchantment.iss_csw.evocationsoul.desc: Increases Evocation Spell Power and Arrow Damage by 3% per level (Neutralizes with Wild Growth)
enchantment.iss_csw.bloodline.desc: Increases Crimson Spell Power and Healing Effectiveness by 3% per level (Neutralizes with Holiness)
enchantment.iss_csw.holiness.desc: Increases Holy Spell Power by 3% and Attack Damage by 1 per level (Neutralizes with Bloodline)
enchantment.iss_csw.thunderflash.desc: Increases Lightning Spell Power by 3% and Move speed by 1 per level (Neutralizes with End breath)
enchantment.iss_csw.endbreath.desc: Increases ender spell power and mana recovery speed by by 3% per level (Neutralizes with Fulgurant Flash).
enchantment.iss_csw.elusive.desc: Decreases Magic Power by 7% per level
enchantment.iss_csw.shatter.desc: Decreases Armor Toughness by 2 per level
enchantment.iss_csw.miniaturize.desc: Decreases Attack Damage by 10% per level
enchantment.iss_csw.overload.desc: Decreases Max Mana by 10% per level
